projectDescription: Curated collection of Summer 2026 tech internships for students, maintained by Pitt CSC and Simplify.
keyFeatures: 1736+ curated tech internship listings for Summer 2026
Five specialized categories: Software Engineering, Product Management, Data Science, Quant Finance, and Hardware Engineering
Off-season internship tracking for Fall 2025, Winter 2026, and Spring 2026
Automated GitHub Actions workflows for processing community contributions
Python CLI tool for managing, validating, and searching internship data
Structured JSON schema with rich metadata (locations, terms, company info, sponsorship status)
Community-driven with contributions from students and Simplify
Issue templates for adding, editing, and bulk-updating internship listings
publicApiSurface: uv run python main.py readme update
uv run python main.py contribution process <event_file>
uv run python main.py listings mark-inactive <event_file>
uv run python main.py listings remove --url <url>
uv run python main.py listings stats [--json]
uv run python main.py listings validate [--fix]
uv run python main.py listings search [--company] [--title] [--location] [--category]
uv run python main.py listings diff [--since] [--commit]
uv run python main.py listings fix [--dry-run] [--type] [--auto]
